_description: Exact-answer scenario definitions for deterministic dataset generation (v0.3.0 — 50 status bar variants, full Maps coverage). Generated by scripts/generate_exact_scenarios.py. All answers visually verified against iOS 26 simulator output. Do not edit by hand — regenerate instead.
_visual_verification_note: iOS 26 Settings main screen does NOT show Airplane Mode, Wi-Fi, or Bluetooth toggles (moved to sub-pages). Only status bar content, Apple Account state, and Maps search bar text are used as exact answers.

default_status_bar._doc: Applied globally via `xcrun simctl status_bar` before capture begins.
